description: FleetCTRL Automation Library — on-demand and provisioning scripts for AVD session host management

scripts.name: Diagnose AVD Agent
scripts.description: Reads full agent state and returns JSON diagnosis with recommended fix script. Always run this first.

scripts.name: Disk Cleanup (Agent Temp)
scripts.description: Cleans temp files, CBS logs, and WU downloads. Fixes DownloadMsiException (Event ID 3277) caused by insufficient disk space for agent updates.

scripts.name: .NET Framework Version Check
scripts.description: Checks if .NET 4.7.2+ is installed. MissingMethodException (Event ID 3389) means .NET is too old for agent updates. Diagnostic only.

scripts.name: Port 443 Connectivity Check
scripts.description: Tests TCP 443 connectivity to AVD broker endpoints. If blocked, agent cannot register or maintain heartbeat (Event 3703).

scripts.name: Check Pending Reboot (Windows Update)
scripts.description: Detects pending reboots from Windows Update, CBS, or component servicing that block AVD agent updates. Reports status only.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Clear Orphaned Local Profiles
scripts.description: Removes orphaned local user profiles from pooled session hosts. Frees disk eaten by failed FSLogix mounts. ONLY run in drain mode with zero sessions.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Restart Services
scripts.description: Restarts FSLogix profile container services. Fixes VHD mount failures after service crash or timeout.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Cloud Cache Status
scripts.description: Uses Microsoft's native Microsoft.FSLogix module to get real-time Cloud Cache provider health: connection state, heartbeat latency, write queue depth, access mode, and uptime.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Cloud Cache Validator
scripts.description: Parses and validates CCDLocations string syntax (case-sensitive!), tests provider accessibility, checks for VHDLocations/CCDLocations conflicts, and validates supporting settings.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Local Cache Analysis
scripts.description: Inspects local Cloud Cache directory (C:\ProgramData\FSLogix\Cache) for per-user cache sizes, total consumption, free space on cache drive, and replication backlog (.queue/.index file counts).

scripts.name: FSLogix: Config Audit
scripts.description: Full dump of all FSLogix registry configuration including Profile Container, ODFC, Cloud Cache, logging, and GPO policy detection. Returns structured JSON with best-practice flags.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Version & Platform Detection
scripts.description: Identifies exact FSLogix version (RTM vs CU1), VDI platform (AVD, W365, Citrix, VMware, RDS), OS type, and PowerShell/Hyper-V module availability.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Health Check
scripts.description: 30+ automated checks across services, configuration, Defender exclusions, storage, Cloud Cache, and version awareness. Returns pass/warn/fail per check with remediation guidance.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Event Log Analyzer
scripts.description: Pulls FSLogix-specific Windows events (Apps, CloudCache logs) with severity classification, key Event ID documentation, and per-user grouping. Configurable time range.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Storage Latency Test
scripts.description: Measures read/write latency to all configured VHDLocations paths. Rates as Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor with threshold-based classification.

scripts.name: FSLogix: OST Migration
scripts.description: Migrates Outlook OST/PST data files into FSLogix Office containers. Creates VHDX, copies data, sets permissions. Adapted from Aaron Parker's migration script (MIT). Requires Hyper-V + AD modules.

scripts.name: FSLogix: ODFC Audit
scripts.description: Full dump of Office Data File Container settings including all Include flags (Outlook, OneDrive, Teams, OneNote, SharePoint), deprecated IncludeSkype detection, and single vs dual container mode.

scripts.name: FSLogix: OST/PST Inventory
scripts.description: Finds Outlook OST/PST data files across user profiles and containers. Reports sizes, locations, and flags oversized files. Identifies whether data is inside ODFC vs profile container vs local disk.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Cross-Platform Readiness
scripts.description: Validates that FSLogix config supports profile roaming between AVD and Windows 365 via Cloud Cache. Checks CCDLocations, identity type, naming conventions, and ODFC parity. Returns readiness score.

scripts.name: FSLogix: VHD-to-CloudCache Prep
scripts.description: Pre-flight check before migrating from VHDLocations to Cloud Cache. Validates target CCDLocations string, storage accessibility, existing profile pickup, case-sensitivity gotchas, and version compatibility.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Profile Share Inventory
scripts.description: Enumerates ALL profile containers on VHDLocations shares — not just active sessions. Detects identity type (AD DS, Entra ID, Entra Guest), container type, ODFC presence, and stale profiles.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Container Stats
scripts.description: Detailed VHD/VHDX statistics including file size, virtual size, white space reclaimable, format, dynamic/fixed, owner, and attachment status. Requires Hyper-V module.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Profile Cleanup
scripts.description: Removes bloat data (browser caches, Teams cache, temp files, crash dumps) from inside profile containers based on configurable age thresholds. Adapted from Aaron Parker's targets (MIT).

scripts.name: FSLogix: Top Consumers
scripts.description: Reports the largest profile containers sorted by size with username, SID, identity type, last access date, and growth indicators.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Redirections Generator
scripts.description: Generates FSLogix redirections.xml from best-practice templates covering browser caches, Teams (classic + new), new Outlook, OneDrive, Slack, Spotify, and more. Based on Aaron Parker's curated list (MIT).

scripts.name: FSLogix: Redirections Audit
scripts.description: Reads current redirections.xml, lists all exclusions/inclusions, and compares against best-practice template. Flags missing recommended exclusions for Teams, browser caches, etc.

scripts.name: FSLogix: App Masking Viewer
scripts.description: Lists FSLogix App Masking rules (.fxr) and assignments (.fxa) from the Rules directory. Shows rule type, target path, action, and assignment targets (user, group, process).

scripts.name: FSLogix: Defender Exclusion Fix
scripts.description: Checks and applies FSLogix best-practice Microsoft Defender exclusions: .vhd/.vhdx/.cim extensions, FSLogix process exclusions, and Apps path exclusion. Reports what was missing and what was applied.

scripts.name: FSLogix: VHD Compact
scripts.description: Compacts dynamic VHD/VHDX files to reclaim unused white space. Checks mount status before compacting. Requires Hyper-V PowerShell module. Reports space saved per container.

scripts.name: FSLogix: VHD Repair
scripts.description: Scans and repairs corrupted VHD/VHDX file systems using Repair-Volume. Mounts read-only for scan, unmounts for offline repair if issues found. Requires Hyper-V module.

scripts.name: FSLogix: Profile Reset
scripts.description: Backs up (renames) a user's profile container and deletes it so they get a fresh profile on next sign-in. Verifies user is not currently logged in. Returns backup path for potential restoration.

scripts.name: Reinstall AVD Agent (Full)
scripts.description: Complete uninstall and reinstall of AVD agent + bootloader. Requires reboot. Use when agent is corrupted or wrong version. FleetCTRL passes RegistrationToken as argument.

scripts.name: Install AVD Agent (Fresh)
scripts.description: Installs AVD agent from scratch on a VM with no agent. Requires reboot. Use diagnose_agent first to confirm agent is truly missing.

scripts.name: Collect AVD Diagnostic Logs
scripts.description: Gathers AVD agent logs, event log entries, and service state into a single JSON bundle for support troubleshooting.

scripts.name: Install-WindowsUpdates
scripts.description: Installs available Windows updates via the Windows Update COM API

scripts.name: Install-M365Updates
scripts.description: Triggers Microsoft 365 / Office Click-to-Run update

scripts.name: Update-DefenderSignatures
scripts.description: Updates Windows Defender antivirus signatures via MpCmdRun.exe

scripts.name: Send-LogoffWarning
scripts.description: Sends a toast/WTS warning message to all connected user sessions

scripts.name: Install-FSLogix
scripts.description: Downloads and installs the latest FSLogix Apps with best-practice registry configuration, Defender exclusions, and version detection. Supports fresh install and upgrade.

scripts.name: Re-register AVD Agent (Token)
scripts.description: Resets IsRegistered to 0, injects new pool token, deletes BootLoader key, restarts. Fixes transitioning/wrong pool/expired token. FleetCTRL passes token as first script argument.

scripts.name: Move Host to Different Pool
scripts.description: Moves a session host between pools without reimaging. Same as re-register but FleetCTRL passes the TARGET pool's token.

scripts.name: Wipe Agent State and Re-register
scripts.description: Nuclear option: deletes BOTH registry hives entirely, recreates with clean state. Use when re-register fails due to corrupted hive.

scripts.name: Logoff Disconnected Sessions
scripts.description: Force logoff all DISCONNECTED sessions only. Active sessions are never touched. Use before maintenance or agent repair.

scripts.name: Restart AVD Agent Services
scripts.description: Force-restarts RdAgent and RDAgentBootLoader. Fixes 90% of random "went unhealthy" situations. Microsoft recommended first step.

scripts.name: Set Agent Delayed Auto-Start
scripts.description: Sets RDAgentBootLoader to Delayed Auto start. Prevents boot-race condition where agent loses to other services. MS documented fix for hosts unhealthy after every reboot.

scripts.name: Reinstall SxS Network Stack
scripts.description: Uninstalls and reinstalls the RDP side-by-side stack MSI. Fixes InstallationHealthCheckFailedException and missing rdp-sxs listener in qwinsta.

scripts.name: Remove DisableRegistryTools Block
scripts.description: Removes DisableRegistryTools GPO key that prevents agent from installing SxS stack. Fixes installMsiException errors.
